content:
# Controller Emulator (TUI)
**Tech:** Python, Textual, vgamepad, evdev

Designed a terminal-based (Textual) application that maps keyboard input
to a virtual gamepad, supporting Xbox, DualShock, and Wii profiles
with a modal keybind editor.

Implemented profile persistence (profiles.json) and cross-platform
support (Windows via vgamepad, Linux via uinput/evdev).
name: controller-emulator.md

content:
# NixOS Install Manager
**Tech:** C, GPG, NixOS

Created a secure, C-based utility that manages NixOS system packages
through a GPG-encrypted file, decrypting, editing, and re-encrypting
before triggering nixos-rebuild.

Employs trie data structures for safe package lookups
and ensures secure memory handling.
name: nixos-manager.md

content:
# Remote Agent System (RAT 2.0)
**Tech:** Python, Kotlin, Android SDK, WebSockets, TLS

Engineered a remote device control system for headless Android phones:
Python GUI (Tkinter) controller + Android agent using MediaProjection
and Accessibility services.

Features live screen streaming, touch injection, shell commands,
and TLS-encrypted WebSocket communication.
name: remote-agent.md

content:
# Student Guidance System (SGS)
**Tech:** Python, scikit-learn, Flask, JavaScript

Developed an integrated ML platform that predicts student career paths
(Random Forest, ~89% accuracy) and assesses mental health conditions
(MLP Classifier, 82% accuracy).

Created a Flask API and dark-themed JavaScript dashboard with
interactive charts and PDF report export.
name: student-guidance-system.md

content:
# Zero Trust File Sharing
**Tech:** Rust, Flutter, Libp2p, AES-256-GCM

Built a peer-to-peer file sharing application with end-to-end encryption
using X3DH key agreement and Double Ratchet algorithm for forward secrecy.

Implemented a Rust backend (Tokio, Axum, Libp2p) and a cross-platform
Flutter frontend, enabling secure file transfers without a central server.
name: zero-trust-fileshare.md
